android.widget.TextView.text: Celebrity chef Gordon Ramsay hosts ambitious chefs facing unique cooking challenges, in a culinary competition to be the food world’s next superstar.
android.widget.TextView.heading: false

android.widget.TextView.text: The final three contestants must create dishes on all three levels in 90 minutes.
android.widget.TextView.heading: false

android.widget.TextView.text: The remaining contestants prepare a show-stopping next level dish in the semifinals.
android.widget.TextView.heading: false

android.widget.TextView.text: Go to settings to turn it off
android.widget.TextView.heading: false
